description: Deed of acknowledgment (iqrār). In Arabic script. Fragment (bottom part only). The name ʿAllūn b. Yaḥyā al-Isrāʾīlī al-[...] appears in the last line of the body. One of the witness statements is by ʿAbdallāh b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān b. ʿĀṣim. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
